NE 218 liquid scintillator
The target thickness was measured by counting the
elastically scattered deuterons, with a solid-state
detector mounted on a second low-mass cantilever arm.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
The targets were self-supporting foils mounted on thin
aluminum holders. 250 ug/cm2 10B targets were prepared
by evaporating 96% enriched 10B from a carbon boat.
